meta_title: For Students: freelance pitching to Solve no marketing skills (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome no marketing skills. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelance Pitching for Students: Beat No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Master freelance pitching to overcome marketing gaps. Use this intermediate checklist with Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your AI career today.
content.answer_block: Freelance pitching is your shortcut to bypassing traditional marketing. By treating your code as a solution to a specific business pain point, you shift from 'selling' to 'consulting.' Use Claude Code to automate outreach analysis and Antigravity to build high-converting, personalized landing pages for every individual prospect you target.
content.intro:
You’ve spent hundreds of hours mastering Python, React, and LLM orchestration, yet the void of 'marketing' feels like an insurmountable wall. You aren't a marketer; you're a builder. But in the real world, the code that stays on your local machine is invisible to the people who need it most.

Stop waiting for the perfect moment or a viral post. We are going to flip the script. You don't need a marketing department; you need a systematic, code-first approach to freelance pitching. By leveraging AI-driven tooling, you can scale your outreach and demonstrate value before you ever send an invoice.

steps.title: Identify High-Value Pain Points
steps.description: Don't sell 'AI apps.' Sell the resolution of a specific, expensive business problem. Use Claude to scrape public business data and identify inefficiencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this business website's FAQ and support page; list 3 specific operational bottlenecks that an AI agent could solve.

steps.title: Build the Proof of Concept (PoC)
steps.description: Create a micro-tool that solves the identified pain point. A working demo is the strongest pitch you can ever send.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a lightweight FastAPI skeleton that demonstrates the core logic for the identified bottleneck solution.

steps.title: Craft Personalized Outreach
steps.description: Stop mass-emailing. Write a pitch that references the specific problem you identified in step 1.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a 150-word cold email that connects the identified bottleneck to my PoC demo. Keep it professional, concise, and impact-focused.

steps.title: Deploy a Personalized Landing Page
steps.description: Use Antigravity to spin up a custom landing page for each lead, showing them exactly how your tool benefits their brand.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a landing page template with dynamic variables for client name and company logo, highlighting the specific solution built in step 2.

steps.title: Automate the Follow-up Loop
steps.description: Persistence wins deals. Schedule automated, value-add follow-ups that provide more insights rather than just 'checking in'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a follow-up email sequence that offers a free audit of their current process as a value-add for the second contact.

pro_tips: Always attach a Loom video walkthrough of your PoC; it increases response rates by 300% compared to text-only pitches.
Target 'micro-SaaS' owners or local business owners; they have the budget and the immediate pain points you can solve.
Never lead with your resume; lead with the solution to their specific problem.
Use Claude Code to analyze your own codebases for potential 'white-label' products you can resell to multiple clients.
Keep your pitch under 3 sentences; respect their time and prove you are a professional who values efficiency.
resources: Cold Email Mastery for Developers: https://dev.to/marketing-for-devs
content.next_steps: Once you land your first client, focus on turning that project into a repeatable asset. Use the feedback from your first pitch to refine your PoC into a full-scale product, and begin building your portfolio site using the same deployment tools you used for your clients.
content.conversion_block: You have the technical skills; now you have the strategy to monetize them. Stop building in the dark and start engineering your own opportunities. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
